overall_summary: The elizaOS community is navigating a transitional phase characterized by concerns over team continuity and token performance, while maintaining technical momentum through new risk-management plugins and infrastructure expansions for Solana and BSC.
key_facts: Project leadership confirmed Solana and BSC (Binance Smart Chain) as the two active blockchain infrastructures currently in use.
The ZARQ crypto risk intelligence plugin was published, providing pre-trade risk scoring for 205 tokens within ElizaOS.
PR #266 was submitted to the plugin registry to integrate the xproof plugin for on-chain agent audit trails.
The team confirmed they hold all ai16z tokens from the migration snapshot, with on-chain verification available for transparency.
Strategic integrations for WhatsApp, Gmail, and the N8N workflow engine were finalized to expand agent reach.
The SAID Protocol was introduced to provide agents with verifiable digital identities on the Solana blockchain.
A major database refactor (PR #6509) was initiated to improve long-term system architecture and performance.
Team members addressed community FUD regarding Twitter bio changes by reaffirming commitment to the 'milady project' and 'Spartan Degen AI'.
open_questions: Is the team interested in OTC investment?
Why doesn't the team do buybacks when prices are depressed?
Have you ever had an agent exhaust its balance mid-task and leave you with unpaid compute? How are you handling it today?

new_issues_prs.title: xproof plugin for On-Chain Audit Trails
new_issues_prs.author: jasonxkensei
new_issues_prs.significance: Adds compliance gating and decision certification for agents.

new_issues_prs.title: Database refactor for system architecture
new_issues_prs.author: unknown
new_issues_prs.significance: Critical upgrade for long-term scalability and speed.

overall_focus.claim: The project is focused on a major beta release, prioritizing platform stability, messaging integrations (WhatsApp/Gmail), and decentralized identity via the SAID Protocol.

discord_updates.summary: High levels of community anxiety regarding ELIZAOS token price and team commitment; leadership clarified development on Solana/BSC and the upcoming Milady project.
Dominated by developer introductions and networking. New proposals for agent-to-vendor credit lines with atomic slashing were introduced for validation.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Frustration over ELIZAOS hitting all-time lows and perceived lack of progress/marketing since late 2025.
Request for team to implement token buybacks during price depressions to support market value.

strategic_insights.insight: Attrition in visible team members' social profiles is creating a trust deficit that overshadows technical progress on plugins and integrations.
implications_or_questions: Should the team increase the frequency of technical 'proof-of-build' demos to counter bio-change FUD?

strategic_insights.insight: The proposal for bond-based credit lines between agents and API vendors suggests a shift toward professionalizing AI-to-B (AI-to-Business) payment defaults.
implications_or_questions: Is this credit primitive essential for ElizaOS to scale beyond hobbyist use cases?

market_analysis.observation: ELIZAOS token reached new all-time lows during this period, triggering significant discord debate.
market_analysis.relevance: Directly impacts community morale and perceived project viability.
